seoTitle: Mountain Creek vs Mourilyan — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mountain Creek and Mourilyan. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mountain Creek vs Mourilyan: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mountain Creek and Mourilyan.
heading: Mountain Creek vs Mourilyan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mountain Creek, Queensland and Mourilyan, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mourilyan has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Mountain Creek (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mountain Creek or Mourilyan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mountain Creek has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Mourilyan scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mountain Creek scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Mourilyan scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mountain Creek or Mourilyan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mourilyan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
